63: -- Enable Row Level Security (RLS)
64: ALTER TABLE public.website_pooja_products ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
65: 
66: -- Drop policies if they exist
67: DROP POLICY IF EXISTS "Allow public read access to website_pooja_products" ON public.website_pooja_products;
68: DROP POLICY IF EXISTS "Allow all access to website_pooja_products" ON public.website_pooja_products;
69: 
70: -- Create policy to allow public select
71: CREATE POLICY "Allow public read access to website_pooja_products"
72: ON public.website_pooja_products
73: FOR SELECT
74: TO anon, authenticated
75: USING (true);
76: 
77: -- Create policy to allow all write access (since admin panel performs writes directly)
78: CREATE POLICY "Allow all access to website_pooja_products"
79: ON public.website_pooja_products
80: FOR ALL
81: TO anon, authenticated
82: USING (true)
83: WITH CHECK (true);
84: 
85: -- Create performance indexes
86: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS website_pooja_products_category_idx ON public.website_pooja_products(category);
87: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS website_pooja_products_is_featured_idx ON public.website_pooja_products(is_featured) WHERE is_featured = true;
88: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS website_pooja_products_is_published_idx ON public.website_pooja_products(is_published) WHERE is_published = true;
